simple_types.name: Peripheral_Function
simple_types.code:
type Peripheral_Function is (A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, …,
                             Disabled);

simple_types.name: Port_Controller

tagged_types.name: GPIO_Point

access_types.name: Any_GPIO_Controller
access_types.code: type Any_GPIO_Controller is access all Port_Controller;

subprograms.name: Set_Function
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Function (This : in out GPIO_Point;
                        Func :        Peripheral_Function)

documentation.description:
Set the peripheral function for the given pin. The function is disabled
by default.

See Multiplexed Peripheral Signals table of your device reference manual
for more information about the available functions.

subprograms.name: Set_Mode
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Mode (This : in out GPIO_Point;
                    Mode : HAL.GPIO.GPIO_Config_Mode)

subprograms.name: Set_Pull_Resistor
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Pull_Resistor (This : in out GPIO_Point;
                             Pull : HAL.GPIO.GPIO_Pull_Resistor)

subprograms.name: Support
